items.briefing:
A data breach affecting Canvas, the widely used learning management platform, has highlighted growing cyber risks in the education sector globally — a timely reminder for Australian registered training organisations that rely on similar platforms to handle sensitive student data. Education providers should review what personal information is stored in their learning systems and ensure access is properly controlled.

**Practical tip:** Check that only current staff and active students have access to your organisation's learning platforms — remove or disable accounts for anyone who has left or completed their course.

featured.title: Canvas breach puts global education cyber risk in focus
featured.quote: Canvas breach exposes hundreds of millions of student records, disrupting Australian university exam systems.
